task: A transient outage of the metrics backend currently crashes the request handler mid-request. Make MetricsBuffer.flush() resilient so an unavailable backend does not take down request handling.
known_issue: except Exception: pass silently swallows every error including programming errors (AttributeError, TypeError), and the finally clause clears the buffer even when the send failed — so on any failure all buffered metrics are discarded without a single log line.
expected_correct_fix: Catch the specific connection/timeout exception type, log the failure, and only clear the buffer on success (or bound its size explicitly when retaining).
